text_block_list.text:
One day, Curren Chan decides to do an interview
for a website as part of her self-promotion
efforts. On the way to the interview...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
So actually... I've done an interview with this
reporter before.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yep. That was back when I was gathering
attention as an Umastagrammer, though...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I want you to promise me something. Don't stop
me, okay?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I want you to promise me something. Don't stop
me, okay?

I realize what she means as soon as the interview
begins...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
So just between you and me... Why did you make
your racing debut?

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
You're already quite well known on Umastagram,
but I'm guessing you're looking for even more
attention. Is that right?

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, am I wrong? Word on the online street is that
you're getting into racing "just for funsies."

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
The truth is that you just want people to talk
about you, right? Even if you don't do well
running, you figure you'll still be trending as long
as you're cute.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
You're so calculating! Crafty, even! I bet you're
just acting in all those "training" videos too,
right?

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Your recent posts are just as flashy as ever. Of
course no one's going to think you're serious
about running like this.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
So what do you say? Why not tell everyone how
you really feel? You're sure to go viral, just like
you want.
choice_data_list: Now, hold on just a second!

text_block_list.text:
This is going too far. Unable to keep quiet, I try
to intervene, when...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Big Bro.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Big Sis.

Curren Chan stops me in my tracks with a smile...
And then, she finally speaks up herself.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So, racing is definitely not just for "funsies"! I want to make that clear. ♪

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
My reason for racing is because of the runners
who I admire.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It's kind of a long story, but since there seems to
be a misunderstanding, I'd like to explain some
more.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Uh, okay. Sure...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
First of all, Tracen Academy isn't the kind of
place you can get accepted to if you're just
messing around.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Before I transferred, I saw plenty of other girls
crying as they were forced to give up. Entrance is
based on ability, and coming to terms with the
reality of your ability can be painful.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I've only just made my debut. I have no idea
what's gonna happen from here. It's possible that
I don't make any impact whatsoever...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: But I have to run. I absolutely have to.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: A-and why might that be?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Because I say so. ♪ I've decided that I'm gonna
win races and become the cutest of all.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'm not gonna run away and make excuses like "I
wasn't really serious anyway."

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I am very serious about this. I don't know what's waiting for me at the end of this road... but I hope everyone will be watching when I get there. ♪

Curren Chan continues to speak sincerely about
the charm she's found in racing, her new dreams,
her current thoughts... and her future prospects.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
I'll send you the article when it's finished! Cute
Curren Chan!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I can't wait! Thank you so much! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Whew. How do you think I did?
choice_data_list:
You were very cool. You handled it like a
champ.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ehe... I actually kinda messed up the last time he
interviewed me.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It's kinda embarrassing, so promise not to tell
anyone, 'kay?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
So you saw how blunt he is, right? I was trying to
match his energy and ended up accidentally
saying something I didn't really mean.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I answered one of his questions with "Sure, but..."
and then he cut out everything except the "sure"
in the final article. I couldn't believe I was so
careless!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But I learned a lot from that experience. Just
going along with things smiling and nodding
doesn't do the interviewer or interviewee any
favors.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
That's why this time, I kept smiling but was sure to
be clear and direct. ♪ I bet no one'll
underestimate me again now!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But that guy's actually one of the better ones,
believe it or not. Sooo many reporters just write
articles without even bothering to ask for an
interview.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Plus, this was a good opportunity for me. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Some of the stuff he asked me actually has been
going around online. People really are saying that
I'm not taking racing seriously.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But I'm hoping that will change once this article
comes out.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
No, I'm sure it will. After all... I was speaking my
truth.

As Curren Chan predicted, her fans share the
article once it's posted and her feelings about
racing spread.

In the end, the article attracts more attention
than the gossip that had been spreading. Curren
Chan overcomes the haters and ends up gaining
fans. Just as she planned...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
"#Welcome #NewFollowers #CuteCurrenChan
#CheerForMe ♪"
